description: Integrate WorkManager into the WeatherApp project to perform periodic background data synchronization. Add the dependency `androidx.work:work-runtime-ktx:2.9.1` to the app's `build.gradle.kts`. Implement a `SyncWorker` class extending `CoroutineWorker` at `app/src/main/java/com/example/weatherapp/sync/SyncWorker.kt` that saves the current system time in milliseconds to SharedPreferences (name: "weather_prefs", key: "last_sync_time") and returns `Result.success()`. Configure the `WeatherApplication` class at `app/src/main/java/com/example/weatherapp/WeatherApplication.kt` to schedule a `PeriodicWorkRequest` for the `SyncWorker` every 15 minutes with a `NetworkType.CONNECTED` constraint. The work must be enqueued using `enqueueUniquePeriodicWork` with the name "weather_sync" and a `KEEP` policy. Ensure the `WeatherApplication` is properly registered in the `AndroidManifest.xml`.
